top_signals.title: DOE issues order to keep Michigan coal-fired power plant in operations
top_signals.summary: Order directs J.H. Campbell coal-power plant in West Olive to take all steps necessary to remain available to operate and to minimize costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
